result:
All three verifications passed:

1. ✅ **`pnpm install`** — exited 0 (195 packages installed with `--ignore-workspace`)
2. ✅ **`pnpm typecheck`** — exited 0, no TypeScript errors
3. ✅ **Render to `out/video.mp4`** — 498 KB (well above the 50 KB threshold), all 300 frames rendered successfully

The video is a 10-second (300 frames @ 30fps), 1080×1080 composition with:
- **"Hello"** title fading in from opacity 0→1 over frames 0–30 via `interpolate`, then staying visible
- **"one"** caption popping in at frame 120 with spring easing (60-frame window)
- **"two"** caption popping in at frame 180 with spring easing (60-frame window)  
- **"three"** caption popping in at frame 240 with spring easing (60-frame window)

EVAL_DONE
